decomposition.transcript: Your lymph nodes are blocked. And if you sit all day, they get worse.
decomposition.visual_summary: Mid-shot, woman in white coat, soft clinical lighting, direct camera gaze, lean-in on key word.
decomposition.inferred_pains: general fatigue, morning swelling, neck & shoulder tension, lymph stagnation symptoms
decomposition.why_it_works: Combines specific medical claim with relatable everyday behavior (sitting). The 'are blocked' creates immediate body awareness, while 'sit all day' implicates the viewer. Authority + fear + personal relevance = high stop-scroll.

mapped.core_message_name: Blocked Lymph Flow from long sitting
